title: Simple Gunpowder and Charcoal Recipes
description: Adds simple recipes for gunpowder and charcoal.
body:
A simple mod that adds sulfur ore, sulfur, and a recipe for both gunpowder and charcoal.

How to craft gunpowder:

Mine sulfur ore (spawns at 16-125) and combine it with charcoal on a crafting table to get gunpowder.

New recipe for charcoal:

Place any type of wood log on a campfire and wait for it to turn into charcoal.

 

Want a mod to help gather resources for TACZ guns?:

[[TACZ] Resource Gathering](https://modrinth.com/mod/tacz-resource-gathering)

 

Feel free to use my mod in free modpacks, but they have to be hosted only on Curse Forge

 

Need help/found a bug? Join the Discord!

[EnderCraftLabs Development](https://discord.gg/SZXJgun7NN)
